title: DSA Practice Gets a Cyberpunk Twist: Real-Time AI Assist Meets Tower-Defense Vibes
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's latest DSA practice evolution with AI-assisted guidance and a cyberpunk Code Breach aesthetic, highlighting real-time feedback and interactive problem solving.
core_message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style problems with Azure OpenAI-assisted guidance and a cyberpunk visual theme, delivering an immersive, feedback-rich DSA practice experience.
cta: Try a problem now and engage with AI help to optimize solutions in real time.
visual_brief: A short motion clip: split-screen showing (left) live code editor with green success ticks and (right) dynamic cyberpunk game-like visuals representing problem concepts as towers; include subtle UI glow, code-to-solution flowlines, and a quick problem prompt at the bottom.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
